title: cynoglossum modestum
intro: Cynoglossum modestum, also known as Chinese forget-me-not or Chinese blue forget-me-not, is a plant species in the borage family native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving coughs, as well as supporting the immune system and cardiovascular health. Cynoglossum modestum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or supplements, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
